home.title: Reports
home.subtitle: A dedicated reporting workspace. These screens are built with stable contracts so the data access layer can evolve later without breaking UX.

disclaimer.title: About this module
disclaimer.note: Reports use direct tables today. Later we can switch providers to database views/read models without changing the screens.

payouts.title: Payouts report
payouts.note: Paid amounts, fees, and missing proof.

sessions.title: Sessions report
sessions.subtitle: Operational view of sessions across a date range.

trend.title: Sessions trend
trend.note: Daily total sessions in the selected range.

table.title: Sessions list
table.note: A paginated list of sessions for drill-down.

paymentsRevenue.title: Payments & revenue report
paymentsRevenue.subtitle: Finance truth sourced from the accounting layer (journal entries/lines). Numbers depend on selected filters, currency, and date range.

kpis.platformRevenueHint: Recognized platform revenue in the range.
kpis.practitionerPayableHint: Outstanding practitioner liability as of the end of the range.
kpis.refundsHint: Refund amount processed in the range.
kpis.vatHint: VAT payable movement in the range.

support.title: Support report
support.subtitle: Operational view of support tickets and handling speed.

kpis.avgCloseHint: Average hours to close (based on closed/resolved timestamps).

table.title: Tickets list
table.note: A paginated list of tickets for drill-down.
table.subject: Subject

careRequests.title: Care requests report
careRequests.subtitle: Requests that require approval for practitioner messaging.

kpis.pendingAgingHint: Pending requests older than 7 days (as of end date).

table.title: Requests list
table.note: A paginated list of chat requests for drill-down.

payouts.title: Payouts report
payouts.subtitle: Payout operations and remaining practitioner dues. Numbers depend on selected filters, currency, and date range.

kpis.missingProofHint: Payouts without proof file in range.
kpis.transferFeesHint: Total transfer fees captured on payout records.
kpis.dueOutstandingHint: Sum of remaining due amounts as of end date.
kpis.settlementsWithDueHint: Count of settlements that still have due.

table.title: Payouts operations
table.note: A paginated list of payouts for drill-down.
